SharePoint doesn't provide the out-of-the-box option to import data from Excel file to existing list. If you want to put some data from Excel to new list using Import Spreadsheet app, but it's not very flexible and sometimes problematic. For example, you have to use browser that supports ActiveX controls (=Internet Explorer). There is, however, an interesting workaround which is based on…
